name: Spicy Eggplant Spread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F.
2. Place the eggplant, cut-side down, on a foil-lined baking sheet.
3. Bake for 30 to 45 minutes, or until soft. Remove from the oven and set aside to cool.
Alternatively, grill the eggplant over hot coals.
4. When cool enough to handle, peel and cut the pulp into large chunks. This can be done up to two days in advance and kept refrigerated.
5. Heat the oil in a large saucepan over medium-high heat.
6. Add the onion and cook for 2 to 3 minutes.
7. Add the garlic and continue cooking until soft but not brown, about 2 minutes.
8. Add the eggplant, coriander, turmeric, and sugar. Cook until soft and well combined, about 5 to 10 minutes.
9. Stir in the yogurt and season generously with salt and pepper.
10. Serve hot, warm, or at room temperature.
Yield: 2 to 2 1/2 cups
